title: PedalBuildManifest
description: Top-level schema for a .manifest.zip produced by manifest-creator and consumed by pedal-build-manager.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Must be '1.0' for this schema.

board_name.description: Machine-readable board slug, used as the URL slug in pedal-build-manager. Lowercase, hyphens, no spaces. e.g. fuzz-face

display_name.description: Human-readable board name for display in the UI. e.g. Fuzz Face Clone

version.description: Board version string, e.g. 1.0.0, v1.2. Used to distinguish board revisions in the build manager.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this manifest was generated.

board_bounds.description: Bounding box of the board in mm, in the same coordinate system as component positions. The SVG viewport is sized to this box.

x.description: Left edge of board in mm

y.description: Top edge of board in mm

layers.description: Map of logical layer name to SVG filename within the zip. All SVGs share the board_bounds viewport.

f_mask.description: Front solder mask SVG path, e.g. svg/f_mask.svg

pth_drills.description: PTH drill holes SVG path (optional — omit if board has no PTH holes)

npth_drills.description: NPTH drill holes SVG path (optional — omit if board has no NPTH holes)

components.description: All components on the board. Includes DNP and exclude_from_bom items (flagged accordingly); the build manager decides what to show.
